title: Manglilla latifolia
taxonomy: Manglilla latifolia is classified under the family Capparaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the caper family. It belongs to the order Brassicales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes many species of Brassicas. The genus Manglilla is considered a synonym of the genus Capparis, which is a genus of flowering plants that is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Manglilla latifolia is a species of flowering plant that is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is a climbing or scrambling plant with small, white flowers and is often found growing in dense thickets in the wild.
